trusted_7612_reference.history: deep46 accepted conservative rewrite; retained ordered top/left/magnitude for invalid-slot index safety

claim: generator-family exact and all valid-slot computations unchanged

scatter_repair.problem: The 7578 graph gates invalid update values to zero but still evaluates arbitrary invalid indices; fresh cases reached indices 659 and 674 for a 650-element seed.
scatter_repair.inertness: Invalid pq_obj_code_valid is zero and ScatterElements uses reduction=max on a zero seed; an in-range zero update cannot erase a nonzero valid update.
scatter_repair.valid_slots: p_valid=true selects the original base exactly.

floating_exactness: The rewritten float16 operands are integers or half-integers and every partial sum stays below magnitude 1024, where these values are represented exactly; association order cannot change a bit.

empirical_confirmation.known_raw_equal_to_trusted_7612: 266/266 in each of disable_all and default
empirical_confirmation.fresh_raw_equal_to_trusted_7612: 5000/5000 on each of two seeds in each ORT mode
